ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_no" INTEGER /* Invoice number */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was generated */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the invoice */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the invoice */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the invoice */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total tax amount for the invoice */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount for the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state or province */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Customer's postal code */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Customer's country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provides the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "invoice_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice that includes this item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the invoice */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the warehouse manager */,
  "manager_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Supplier's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Supplier's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Supplier's state or province */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Supplier's postal code */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Supplier's country code */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier's contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier's contact person */,
  "contact_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier's contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total tax amount for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that includes this item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax entry */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the tax rate applies */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate as a percentage */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_dollar" INTEGER /* Number of points earned per dollar spent */,
  "points_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the points expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "customer_loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer loyalty entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who is a member of the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer is a member of */,
  "points_balance" INTEGER /* Current points balance for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time the review was left */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the product */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date and time the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the return has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_items" (
  "return_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return item */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the return that includes this item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_items_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id")
)
